results.title: ‘Love Island USA’ Drops Islander Ahead of Season 8 Premiere After Alleged Use of N-Word
results.description: Days before Love Island USA is set to kick off its eighth season, islander Vasana Montgomery has been pulled from the cast after social media posts emerged of her using the n-word. Montgomery, a business owner from Beaverton, Oregon, has been dropped from the cast, The Hollywood Reporter has confirmed.
